---
title: "Integrated Horizon Scanning Report"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    css: ../../www/styles.css
    toc: true
params:
  last_updated: "2026-03-27"
---

<div class="about-meta">
Last updated: `r params$last_updated`
</div>

---

## Overview

The Global Hub builds on ALIGN’s comprehensive horizon scanning system. This report provides a high-level summary of the horizon scanning activities and their findings.

## Horizon Scanning Goals

The primary goals of the ALIGN horizon scanning system are to:

- **Identify** emerging health products and technologies.
- **Track** development and regulatory progress over time.
- **Anticipate** market entry and potential system bottlenecks.
- **Support** country-led prioritization and introduction planning.

## Key Findings (Summary)

Based on the most recent data extraction (February 2026):

### 1. Robust Pipeline for Infectious Diseases
The pipeline for HIV, TB, and malaria remains strong, with a significant number of products in Phase 2 and Phase 3 development.

### 2. Growth in Diagnostic Innovations
There is a notable increase in the development of point-of-care and laboratory-based diagnostics, particularly for TB and malaria.

### 3. MNCH Expansion
The Hub has successfully integrated initial datasets for maternal, newborn, and child health, revealing a growing portfolio of medical devices and therapeutics targeting maternal disorders.

## Full Report

For a detailed analysis of the current global health product landscape, including deep-dives into specific disease areas and geographic trends, please refer to the full **Horizon Scanning Report** (available for download in PDF format from the project website).

## Methodology Reference

For information on how the horizon scan is performed and how data is integrated, see the [Project Methodology](methodology.html){target="_blank"} and [Source Integration Methods](source_methods.html){target="_blank"} documents.

***

![](../../../www/logo/with_partners.png){height=120px}

© 2026 ALIGN Consortium. All rights reserved.

{{< fa globe >}} [Website](https://alignconsortium.org){target="_blank"}
&nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/ALIGN-Consortium/GlobalHub){target="_blank"}
&nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa envelope >}} [Contact](mailto:align@duke.edu)
